prompt: For the constraint titled "RN legacy same-PR platforms", find the requirement(s) that motivated the architectural decision this constraint shaped. List them.

ground_truth.sparql: SELECT DISTINCT ?s ?title WHERE { GRAPH <https://moosedev.dev/kg/project> { ?c <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#label> "RN legacy same-PR platforms" . ?c ?cp ?ad . FILTER(STRENDS(STR(?cp),"constrains")) ?ad ?mp ?s . FILTER(STRENDS(STR(?mp),"isMotivatedBy")) ?s a ?rk . FILTER(STRENDS(STR(?rk),"Requirement")) ?s <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#label> ?title } }
